title: Heat Resistant Mat for Air Fryer, 3 PCS Kitchen Countertop Protector Mats, Air Fryer Accessories, Kitchen Appliance for Sliders, Like Ninja Foodi Cosori Airfryer, Coffee Maker, Stand Mixer
features: 【Heat Resistant & Protect Countertop】---Kitchen appliance in working mode can generate high temperatures that may damage granite or marble countertop if they come into direct contact with kitchen countertop. The mats just eliminate any fears of scratching or heat damage to your countertops

【Versatile Sliding Mats】---Our air fryer mat is made by felts and has non-slippery protection. Felt side goes against the counter. This allows you to be able to easily slide the appliance without having to lift it. And the silicone dot surface ensure the stability and slip resistance of the machine

【3 PCS & High Quality Material】---Made of premium heavy duty polyester felt, flexible & durable & washable & reusable, one surface attached anti-slip silicone. BYKITCHEN heat resistant mat is 3pcs/set, the size is 17 inch*13 inch*0.12 inch. Enough and big enough for your daily use. And can be cut to the size you need

【Wide Application for Your Kitchen】--- Perfect for Ninja Foodi Cosori air fryer, stand mixer, microwave oven ,coffee pot, toaster, waffle iron, grill and sealer, instant pot and other small appliances.Easily moving your small appliance, and great protection for your countertop against scratches or heat, also help keep your kitchen tidy

【Washable】---These felt kitchen appliance sliders can be hand washed with warm soapy water and if necessary wiped clean with a damp cloth and not recommend to wash these air fryer heat-resistant mats directly in the dishwasher
description: Product Description Heat Resistant Mat for Air Fryer, Set of 3, 17*13inch Countertop Appliance Slider, Air Fryer Mat for Countertop, Counter Slider for Appliances, Kitchen Caddy Sliding Tray for Air Fryer, Coffee Maker, Toaster Oven, Blender, Pressure Cooker and More FEATURE: -Protect your countertop against scratches or heat, and help keep your kitchen tidy. -There are felt sliding side and silicone anti-slip side, help easily slide your appliance back or pull it forward without lift. - Larger than common appliance slider mat, suitable for more kitchen appliance. - Compared with manual appliance sliding trays, this kitchen appliance organize mats are more flexible and more practical.
